antipattern.symptom: Recall@10 drops 5–10pp after switching to Matryoshka dim 256; no early warning.
antipattern.root-cause: Dim reduced "to save storage" without running the bench gate.
antipattern.fix: Always bench Recall@10 at candidate dim before promotion; gate at ≤1pp from baseline.

antipattern.symptom: Cache infra cost exceeds savings; hit_rate <5%.
antipattern.root-cause: Cache wired on a one-shot ingest with no overlap.
antipattern.fix: Only enable cache when recurrence ≥5% per `[[embedding-caching]]` decision tree.

antipattern.symptom: Information loss in retrieval; eval shows missing-evidence regressions.
antipattern.root-cause: Near-dup threshold set too low (e.g., 0.85), collapsing distinct docs.
antipattern.fix: Set near-dup threshold ≥0.98 cosine. Verify on bench before promotion.

antipattern.symptom: Latency overhead from rerank exceeds search-time savings on <100k vector corpus.
antipattern.root-cause: Two-stage adds overhead that only pays off at scale.
antipattern.fix: Enable two-stage only when corpus >1M vectors OR per-query cost dominates.
